backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend for a barcode label printing system, handling print job submission with duplicate serial detection, label settings storage per user, print history, user profiles, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of a barcode width input field feature, listing the affected frontend files and associated component dependencies with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference document for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Make Some Double!! Barcode & Label Printing System' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in ErrorBoundary and PasswordSessionProvider, rendering either LockScreen or AppShell based on the session lock state after mount.
frontend/src/audio/soundSystem.ts: Zustand-persisted sound system that plays Web Audio API beeps or custom audio files for success, error, and print-complete events, with configurable volume and custom sound upload support.
frontend/src/auth/passwordSession.ts: Utility module for creating, retrieving, validating, and clearing an 8-hour password session persisted in localStorage, comparing credentials against the configured expected password.
frontend/src/auth/PasswordSessionProvide: React context provider that manages password session state, rehydrating from localStorage on mount and exposing unlock/lock actions with password validation.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: Main application shell component that renders the header (with logo, backend status, device controls, and lock button), a four-tab navigation (Scan & Print, Label Settings, Devices, Diagnostics), and a footer.
frontend/src/components/BackendAvailabil: Displays a destructive badge when the backend is unavailable; renders nothing when the backend is reachable.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches runtime errors and shows a fallback UI with a page-reload button, or a custom fallback if provided.
frontend/src/components/HeaderDeviceCont: Header control strip showing printer connection status as a badge and an optional wake-lock toggle switch.
frontend/src/components/SerialTypeCounte: Renders a grid of cards showing print counts per configured prefix mapping, or an empty-state prompt if no mappings exist.
frontend/src/components/SoundEffectsSett: Settings UI for configuring sound effects (success, error, print complete) with per-event sound selection, volume slider, file upload for custom sounds, and a test-play button.
frontend/src/config/lockScreenConfig.ts: Exports a helper that returns the lock-screen password, defaulting to 'swh1400' but overridable via the VITE_LOCK_PASSWORD build-time environment variable.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query mutations and queries for submitting print jobs, fetching print history, and incrementing print counts, with backend availability tracking and IC error formatting.
frontend/src/hooks/useWakeLock.ts: React hook that manages the Screen Wake Lock API, persisting the user's preference in localStorage and re-requesting the lock when the page becomes visible again.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a dark warehouse-themed design system with CSS custom properties for colors, a blue accent primary, and minimum 44px touch targets for tablet use.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/printing/barcodePreview.ts: Generates a deterministic SVG barcode image from a serial string by encoding each character as bits and rendering them as SVG rectangles, returning either an SVG string or a data URL.
frontend/src/printing/cpclBarcodeDiagnos: Provides validation and diagnostic logging utilities for CPCL barcode generation, checking for empty data, invalid characters, out-of-bounds positions, and unreasonable barcode heights.
frontend/src/printing/cpclBarcodeMapping: Maps UI barcode type strings (e.g., CODE128, EAN13) to their CPCL printer tokens and recommended width/ratio settings, with a Code 128 fallback for unknown types.
frontend/src/printing/cpclGenerator.ts: Generates CPCL printer command strings for label print jobs by converting mm-based label settings and serial data to dot-unit coordinates, applying barcode mappings, layout adjustments, and validation.
frontend/src/printing/cpclLayoutAdjustme: Provides utilities to clamp barcode X positions within safe printable margins and estimate CODE128 barcode widths in dots to prevent label edge clipping.
frontend/src/printing/LabelPreview.tsx: React component that renders a pixel-accurate visual preview of a two-barcode label using label settings from the store, computing positions in pixels from mm values and enforcing minimum spacing between elements.
frontend/src/printing/previewUnits.ts: Defines shared unit conversion constants and functions for converting between millimeters, printer dots (203 DPI), and CSS pixels for preview rendering.
frontend/src/screens/LockScreen.tsx: Renders a password entry screen that gates access to the app, using the PasswordSessionProvider to validate and unlock the session.
frontend/src/screens/PasswordSessionWiri: Displays a fallback error screen when the password session system is misconfigured, offering the user options to refresh or clear cache.
frontend/src/services/printerService.ts: Zustand store managing USB printer connection state, providing actions to connect, disconnect, send CPCL commands, and run test prints via WebUSB.
frontend/src/services/usbCpclTransport.t: WebUSB transport layer that handles USB printer device discovery, connection setup, and bulk data transfer for CPCL-compatible label printers.
frontend/src/state/backendAvailabilitySt: Zustand store tracking backend availability status, including last error/success timestamps and actions to mark the backend as available or stopped.
frontend/src/state/diagnosticsStore.ts: Persisted Zustand store tracking scan and print counters globally and per label type/prefix, with exported helper functions for incrementing counts.
frontend/src/state/labelSettingsStore.ts: Persisted Zustand store holding label layout settings (dimensions, barcode positions, font sizes, prefix mappings) with versioned migration support and a synchronous getter.
frontend/src/state/logStore.ts: Zustand store with localStorage persistence that maintains a capped list of up to 1000 log entries (info/warn/error) and exposes an `addLog` helper and `useLogs` hook.
frontend/src/state/printHistoryStore.ts: Zustand store with persistence that tracks the last 1000 print history entries and provides a `usePrintHistory` hook with a `reprint` function that resends stored CPCL data to the printer.
frontend/src/state/useLabelSettingsHydra: React hook that returns a boolean indicating whether the label settings Zustand store has finished rehydrating from localStorage.
frontend/src/tabs/DevicesTab.tsx: UI tab for managing printer connections, allowing users to connect/disconnect a USB CPCL printer via WebUSB and send a test print, with appropriate warnings when WebUSB is unsupported.
frontend/src/tabs/DiagnosticsTab.tsx: UI tab displaying three sub-tabs: aggregate stats (scans, prints, errors, per-type counters), print history with reprint capability, and a filterable log viewer.
frontend/src/tabs/LabelSettingsTab.tsx: UI tab for configuring label and barcode settings, including prefix-to-label-type mappings, barcode positioning, import/export of settings JSON, and a live label preview.
frontend/src/tabs/ScanPrintTab.tsx: Main scan-and-print workflow tab that handles two-step serial barcode scanning, validates serials against prefix mappings, generates CPCL, sends to printer, and submits print jobs to the backend.
frontend/src/utils/barcodeSettingsValida: Validation utility that checks label settings (barcode dimensions, label size, barcode positions, and spacing) and returns a structured list of field-level errors.
frontend/src/utils/icErrors.ts: Provides utilities to detect and format Internet Computer errors, specifically IC0508 'canister is stopped' errors, with user-friendly message extraction.
frontend/src/utils/labelSettingsErrors.t: Parses label settings update errors and returns user-friendly messages, handling canister stopped, authorization, network, and other known error types.
frontend/src/utils/labelSettingsImportEx: Handles BigInt-safe JSON serialization for exporting and importing LabelSettings, with field migration/backfilling against defaults.
frontend/src/utils/labelTypes.ts: Defines built-in label types and utilities to extract custom types from prefix mappings, get display names, and merge all available label types.
frontend/src/utils/scanPrintErrors.ts: Formats Scan & Print specific errors (backend submission, printer, and non-blocking backend failures) into concise user-facing strings.
frontend/src/utils/serialNormalization.t: Normalizes scanned serial numbers by trimming whitespace and removing common barcode scanner suffix characters (CR, LF, Tab).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color tokens, border radius, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features, known issues (missing barcode width UI), and a pending action request to add barcode width settings to the label settings tab.
